name: langguard
description: Connects Claude Code to your LangGuard control plane for AI governance — policy enforcement, violation monitoring, entity catalog, and trace audit. Exposes 25 governance MCP tools and three skills (rules, compliance, audit).

api_endpoint.description: Your LangGuard instance URL (no trailing slash). For LangGuard Cloud, use https://app.langguard.ai. For self-hosted, use your custom URL.

api_key.description: LangGuard API key. Create one at <api_endpoint>/settings/api-keys. Stored securely in your OS keychain.

governance_mode.description: How agents should interact with LangGuard. 'compliance' = read-only, agents enforce active policies as mandatory guardrails. 'operations' = read-write, agents can create policies, tag entities, and resolve violations on your behalf.
